title: JoJo's Bizarre Modpack
description: Jojo's Bizarre Modpack is a bizarre collection of mods to recreate the Jojo feeling.
body:
### ⚡ JoJo’s Bizarre Modpack – Stand Awakening
**Step into the bizarre world of JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure and unleash your inner power. 
This modpack transforms Minecraft into a 
supernatural battlefield where Stand users clash in 
stylish, high-speed combat. 
Obtain your Stand through Arrows, Discs, or 
quests, and evolve your abilities as you grow stronger. Master unique powers, outplay your enemies, and carve 
your own path—whether as a heroic Joestar or a ruthless villain. Will you stand at the top… or be crushed by fate?** 

<details>
<summary> Features </summary>

- Stand System with progression & evolutions
  
- Iconic Stands like Star Platinum, The World, Killer Queen, and more
  
- Unique abilities: time stop, healing, space manipulation, and beyond
  
- Hamon, Spin & Vampirism combat paths
  
- Boss fights, events & powerful enemy Stand users
  
- RPG-style leveling & ability upgrades
  
- Optimized for multiplayer & smooth performance
  
- Balanced PvP & PvE Stand combat
  
- Explore, fight, and dominate in a world where power is everything.

</details>
